data.title: RH Demand Soars In December: Analyst Predicts Big Moves In 2025
data.description: RH reported Q3 earnings miss but raised guidance. Demand trends have been better than expected, leading to market share gains and an upgrade by analyst Cristina Fernández.

data.description: ZenaTech stock rises after announcing its subsidiary, ZenaDrone, moved into a new Arizona facility to produce NDAA-compliant military drones.
